emails.subject: Getting started guide
emails.body: Getting started guide Please come back with comments on this document by the end of play Friday, we are going to use this document to send to customers with their passwords (once they have signed the password application agreement. Sorry about the rush but we are moving pretty quickly now. Graphics need to format but content is what I need you to look at. Louise
